title: Brain Over Brawn
body:
# 🧟Brain Over Brawn 

This data pack makes a lot of tweaks to mobs to make them a little more fun to fight.  This is a smaller pack that simply adds a couple tweaks to the games mob


<details>

<summary>🖥️Commands</summary>

**Uninstall**

/function bob:uninstall

</details>




### 💻General Info

Humanoid Mobs can now backstep occasionally, along with certain mobs being able to dash. Creepers can now blow up to open holes for other mobs, Skeletons can now switch between weapons. And possibly more if I update this data pack further.
